notes:
The only workaround required is to add a dot in the end of your save file (if not, the game won't create/detect the save file)

Excelent Performance (125 fps), no stuttering.
title: Red Faction

notes:
Everything runs perfectly, I did not have the issue with the mouse cursor not moving.

However you will need to end the name of every new save file with a .  If you choose an existing save file, it will save and overwrite without issue.
title: Red Faction

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box. I don't have the issue with save files. I also use Dash Faction for widescreen support (there's a guide in Steam which describes how to install it: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1748240979).
title: Red Faction

notes: runs really well, no issues found
